entries.source: "Ask me questions about this poem"
"Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Eman bertsio zailago bat nik saiatu ondoren."

entries.source: "Help me understand this paragraph"
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Summarize chapter 2"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Erabili nire azterketako, proiektuko edo eguneroko bizitzako adibideak."

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
Communication
End with a recap you write yourself.
For Reading Companion, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Reading Companion-rako praktika-ziklo erabilgarria hau da:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Modu honetarako, lana sinplea da: ekarri pasarte edo liburu-ideia bat eta eraiki ulermena laburpenen, hiztegiaren, inferentziaren eta eztabaidaren bidez.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Prompt onek normalean hiru gauza dituzte: gaia, zure egungo maila eta nahi duzun laguntza mota. Ez duzu formulazio perfekturik behar. Saioa hasteko adina testuinguru besterik ez duzu behar.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Erantzuna zabalegia iruditzen bazaizu, estutu. Eskatu adibide bat, uste oker bat, egiaztapen-galdera bat edo hurrengo urrats bat. Errazegia bada, eskatu erronka bat. Zaila bada, eskatu dagoeneko dakizunetik zubi bat.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Reading Companion on inspir.
entries.value: inspir-en Reading Companion erabiliz ikaskuntza-emaitza erabilgarriak lortzeko prompt ideiak eta ikasketa-ziklo errepikagarria.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI erantzun bat irakurtzea ez da ikastea bera. Lehen erantzunaren ondoren, eskatu moduari ideiarekin zerbait eginarazteko.

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Eskatu feedbacka ziurra sentitu ez den zatiari buruz.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Azken laburpen hori garrantzitsua da. Ideia berriro azaltzen duzunean, zer den sendoa eta zer dagoen oraindik AIari mailegatuta erakusten duzu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for reading companion with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Modu hau reading companion-erako doituta dago, bere prompt, adibide eta ikaskuntza-fluxu propioekin.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Reading Companion is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Reading Companion-etik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Gero gehitu saioa pertsonalago egiten duen muga bat:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Reading Companion when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Writing Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Reading Companion lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Writing Coach. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.
